content:
Present Continuous Tense

Present Continuous Tense ဆိုတာ "အခုလုပ်နေတယ်" လို့ ပြောတဲ့ ဝါကျဖြစ်ပါတယ်။ အခုချိန်မှာ လုပ်နေတဲ့ အလုပ်ကို ပြောချင်ရင် သုံးပါတယ်။

Structure/Formula: Subject + am/is/are + Verb-ing + Object

👉 Active: The boy is playing football in the field now. → Passive: Football is being played by the boy in the field now.

👉 Active: My mother is cooking rice in the kitchen. → Passive: Rice is being cooked by my mother in the kitchen.

👉 Active: The students are reading English books now. → Passive: English books are being read by the students now.

👉 Active: She is writing a letter to her friend. → Passive: A letter is being written by her to her friend.

🔑 Key Points:

  • Active မှာ am/is/are + V-ing သုံးပါတယ်။
  • Passive မှာ am/is/are + being + V3 သုံးပါတယ်။
  • Passive မှာ 'by' စကားလုံးကို သုံးပြီး လုပ်သူကို ပြပါတယ်။

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • Passive မှာ 'being' ကို မေ့တတ်ကြပါတယ်။
  • V3 (Past Participle) ကို မှားတတ်ကြပါတယ်။
